title: Five-Bedroom Villa with 270° Views over Patong Bay, Kamala - Phuket
blurb: A five-bedroom hillside villa on Phuket's Millionaire's Mile with 270-degree views sweeping from Patong Bay to the open ocean — a 13-metre infinity pool, hilltop sunset sala, home cinema and freshly renovated kitchen, ten minutes from both Kamala and Patong beaches.
detail:
High on the headland between Kamala and Patong — the stretch of coast known as Phuket's Millionaire's Mile — this five-bedroom villa commands a 270-degree panorama that takes in the hills and lights of Patong Bay on one side and the open ocean and its sunsets on the other. Set within a well-run private estate with 24-hour security, it puts both world-class Kamala Beach and Patong's nightlife within a ten-minute drive.

The entry level opens into a cathedral-like living space under vaulted ceilings, where floor-to-ceiling bi-fold glass pulls back to frame the full sweep of the bay. A recent top-to-bottom renovation replaced the kitchen and dining area entirely, centred on a long fixed dining table made for sociable evenings, backed by a substantial second kitchen in stainless steel for serious food preparation. Outside, wide terraces and sun decks surround a 13-metre infinity-edge pool with an outdoor sound system, alfresco dining areas and a barbecue — and above it all, a covered hilltop sala that is the villa's most magical spot for sunset.

Across 888 m² of living space on two main levels, one guest suite sits on the entry floor while the master suite and three further bedrooms occupy the garden level below, alongside a fully equipped home cinema and a second lounge. Built in 2004 by an Australian contractor and impeccably maintained since, the villa sits on a 1,608 m² landscaped plot within an estate whose infrastructure includes backup power and its own water reserves — quietly reliable comfort behind the spectacle of the view.
